ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock prices are quoted */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the company's Initial Public Offering (IPO) */,
  "short_name" TEXT /* Short name of the company */,
  "long_name" TEXT /* Long name of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the price entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the period */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded during the period */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price after accounting for dividends and splits */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend paid per share */,
  "split" REAL /* Split ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "ex_dividend_date" TEXT /* Ex-dividend date */,
  "payable_date" TEXT /* Date when the dividend is paid */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend per share */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield as a percentage */,
  "dividend_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of dividend payments (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each split entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "split_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock split */,
  "split_ratio" TEXT /* Split ratio (e.g., 2:1, 3:1) */,
  "split_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the stock split */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_splits_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric (e.g., P/E Ratio, EPS) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the financial metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the financial metric (e.g., USD, %) */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the financial metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, trader) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user creating the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the watchlist was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_stocks" (
  "watchlist_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist stock */,
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the watchlist */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date and time the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_stocks_watchlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("watchlist_id") REFERENCES watchlists ("watchlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user creating the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being tracked */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price above, price below) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value of the alert (e.g., price threshold) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
